zh.lifeSummary: 當Cicely Knyveton於1385年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里時，她的父親Anketin Malore Sir45歲，母親Alice de Driby45歲。她於1391年與Sir Robert Moton在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年在英國萊希斯特斯爾比可萊頓享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cicely Knyveton于1385年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里时，她的父亲Anketin Malore Sir45岁，母亲Alice de Driby45岁。她于1391年与Sir Robert Moton在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年在英国萊希斯特斯爾比可萊頓享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Knyveton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kniveton (Derbys) or Kneeton (Notts).

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

en.lifeSummary: When Cicely Knyveton was born in 1385, in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England, her father, Anketin Malore Sir, was 45 and her mother, Alice de Driby, was 45. She married Sir Robert Moton in 1391, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1412, in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cicely Knyveton est née en 1385, à Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Anketin Malore Sir, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice de Driby, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Moton en 1391, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1412, à Peckleton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cicely Knyveton 1385 in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anketin Malore Sir 45 und ihre Mutter Alice de Driby 45. Sie hat 1391 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Moton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1412 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Knyveton è nata il nel 1385 nel Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Anketin Malore Sir, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Alice de Driby, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Moton nel 1391, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1412, nel Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Knyvetonが1385年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルクビー マロリーで生まれた時，父Anketin Malore Sirは45歳，母Alice de Dribyは45歳であった。1391年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでSir Robert Motonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1412年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアペックレトンで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Knyveton(이)가 1385년 영국 레이스스터실르 커크비 맬로리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anketin Malore Sir(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Driby(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Sir Robert Moton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 영국 레이스스터실르 펙레턴에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Knyveton nasceu em 1385, em Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anketin Malore Sir, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Driby, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Moton em 1391, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1412, em Peckleton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cicely Knyveton родилась в 1385 г. в местности киркби маллори, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Anketin Malore Sir было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Driby, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Moton в 1391 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1412 г. в местности пекклетон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cicely Knyveton nació en 1385, en Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Anketin Malore Sir, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice de Driby, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Moton en 1391, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1412, en Peckleton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años.
